DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-datavault-business` creates sanctioned business Data Vault workspaces for modeling business-oriented vault structures.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaBusinessDataVault workspace will be created.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a business hub to an ordered bridge path.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a business link to an ordered bridge path.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a hierarchical link satellite attribute.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a business hub key part.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

Add a business hub satellite attribute.

Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a business point-in-time stamp column.
